task.title: Check AnalyticsTracker for performance issues
task.description: Complete the following task: Check AnalyticsTracker for performance issues. Follow best practices and ensure quality.
constraints: Do NOT modify anything under tests/.
success_criteria: New functionality is covered by tests.

steps.observation:
.
├── Controllers/
│   └── subscriptionController.cs
├── Models/
│   └── subscription.cs
├── Services/

steps.thought: I need to understand the existing code structure.
steps.observation:
version: '3.8'

services:
  subscription:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@db:5432/subscription-project
      - REDIS_URL=redis://cache:6379
    depends_on:
      - db
      - cache
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8080/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  db:
    image: postgres:15
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: subscription-project
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: pass
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  cache:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"

volumes:
  postgres_data:

port = 5432

[cache]

[logging]

[features]
subscription_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true
